facts_srcutils_1150218810412.content: When adding a new module in src/utils/, follow the established co-located test pattern: src/utils/<name>.test.ts next to src/utils/<name>.ts, matching existing files like retry.test.ts and result.test

thoughts_configvalidator_1150220186616.content: Kody's clarifying questions about config fields and rules went unanswered, blocking the implementation — product answers must precede code generation.

facts_srcutils_1150221457053.content: Use TDD: write the test file first (red), then implement the module (green), per project acceptance criteria for new utilities.

thoughts_srcutilsconfigvalidatorts_13322.content: buildTargets validation only checks for Array type, not that elements are strings — {buildTargets: [42]} would pass validation

conventions_srcutils_1332223256682.content: Use Result<T, E> type from src/utils/result.ts for fallible operations instead of throwing

conventions_testing_1332224721014.content: Vitest tests are co-located next to source files using .test.ts suffix (e.g., retry.test.ts, result.test.ts)

facts_srcutilsconfigvalidatorts_13322263.content: TypeScript type errors are caught at build step, not just at runtime — validating element types of arrays is a distinct concern from array type itself
